steps.title: Identify the goal's key signal
steps.content: The student wants to “emphasize the combined deadweight tonnage.” The word “combined” is the decisive signal—it directs focus to the aggregate tonnage of all ships, not individual definitions, ship counts, or DWT in general.

steps.title: Match the signal to the answer
steps.content: Choice C opens with “Combined” and makes the 74.3 million tons figure the main point, accomplishing the emphasis goal. The others either define a term without applying it (A), count ships (B), or omit tonnage (D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
